pred_reason: The contract contains multiple violations of the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern where state updates occur after external calls, and arithmetic operations without proper bounds checking. These findings directly correspond to SWC-101 (Integer Overflow and Underflow) and SWC-107 (Reentrancy) vulnerabilities. Evidence: deposit/withdraw functions update state after safeRewardTransfer call (Finding 1); PRECISION_FACTOR calculation vulnerable to underflow if decimals > 30 (Finding 3); Reentrancy risk persists despite nonReentrant modifier due to callback in reward token transfer (Finding 2)

raw.pred_reason: The contract contains multiple violations of the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern where state updates occur after external calls, and arithmetic operations without proper bounds checking. These findings directly correspond to SWC-101 (Integer Overflow and Underflow) and SWC-107 (Reentrancy) vulnerabilities. Evidence: deposit/withdraw functions update state after safeRewardTransfer call (Finding 1); PRECISION_FACTOR calculation vulnerable to underflow if decimals > 30 (Finding 3); Reentrancy risk persists despite nonReentrant modifier due to callback in reward token transfer (Finding 2)

llm_explanation.reason: The contract contains multiple violations of the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern where state updates occur after external calls, and arithmetic operations without proper bounds checking. These findings directly correspond to SWC-101 (Integer Overflow and Underflow) and SWC-107 (Reentrancy) vulnerabilities.
evidence: deposit/withdraw functions update state after safeRewardTransfer call (Finding 1)
PRECISION_FACTOR calculation vulnerable to underflow if decimals > 30 (Finding 3)
Reentrancy risk persists despite nonReentrant modifier due to callback in reward token transfer (Finding 2)
